title: 'Can't fault the HEDDphone D1 in any meaningful way': HEDD's progeny are emphatically excellent wired headphones at a not-unreasonable price
summary: As Berlin-based audio brand HEDD’s fourth set of over-ear headphones, the HEDDphone D1 continue an impressive run of cleverly-designed pro-grade audio fare — this time, though, with its gaze levelled squarely at the mid-range market.
caption: output/2026-07-21/can-t-fault-the-heddphone-d1-in-any-meaningful-way-hedd-s-progeny-are-.txt
